signal_evidence.consumer_stress_tier: In the U.S. is where we're really navigating the dynamic retail environment with the consumer. That is a little soft coming into the year.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: The slowdown we're experiencing in the U.S. is fairly broad-based... we have identified some opportunities on color and on women sizing.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: We've seen a slower start to Q1 in the U.S. while we continue to see strength in all other regions.
